hero.title: HPC and AI: Shaping the Future at USP
hero.subtitle: Distributed Systems and Concurrent Programming Laboratory - Cutting-edge research in high-performance computing, artificial intelligence, and distributed systems.
section.about.desc: LASDPC (Distributed Systems and Concurrent Programming Laboratory) is based at ICMC-USP, in São Carlos. Founded in 1998, it is a reference in research and innovation in HPC, AI, distributed systems, and cloud computing.

contact.address: ICMC-USP, Av. Trabalhador São-Carlense, 400 - São Carlos, SP, Brazil
